temperature_offset.label: Temperature Offset
temperature_offset.hint: Applied to reported temperature values in degrees Celsius.

humidity_offset.label: Soil Moisture Offset
humidity_offset.hint: Applied to reported soil moisture percentage values.

soil_warning.label: Soil Dryness Threshold
soil_warning.hint: Moisture percentage below which the water alarm triggers (0-100%).

temperature_report_min_interval.label: Temperature Report Minimum Interval
temperature_report_min_interval.hint: Takes effect on the next device wake-up/report.

temperature_report_max_interval.label: Temperature Report Maximum Interval
temperature_report_max_interval.hint: Takes effect on the next device wake-up/report.

temperature_report_change.label: Temperature Report Change
temperature_report_change.hint: Takes effect on the next device wake-up/report.

humidity_report_min_interval.label: Soil Moisture Report Minimum Interval
humidity_report_min_interval.hint: Takes effect on the next device wake-up/report.

humidity_report_max_interval.label: Soil Moisture Report Maximum Interval
humidity_report_max_interval.hint: Takes effect on the next device wake-up/report.

humidity_report_change.label: Soil Moisture Report Change
humidity_report_change.hint: Takes effect on the next device wake-up/report.
